---
title: "UIAO Substrate Manifest Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · substrate-manifest.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/substrate-manifest/substrate-manifest.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/substrate-manifest/substrate-manifest.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://whalermike.github.io/uiao/schemas/substrate-manifest/substrate-manifest.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Schema for the top-level substrate manifest that declares the modules, roles, and drift-scan scope of the UIAO monorepo.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `metadata` | object | ✓ | Canonical frontmatter per src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json. |
| `workspace` | object | ✓ |  |
| `github` | object | ✓ |  |
| `modules` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/module`&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `sub_boundaries` | object |  | Optional sub-boundaries inside a top-level module. |
| `drift_scan` | object | ✓ |  |
| `registry_refs` | object | ✓ |  |
| `retired_slugs` | array&lt;object&gt; |  | Slugs that have been renamed by an ADR. The substrate walker scans canon/ and docs/ for any literal occurrence of `slug` and emits a P2 DRIFT-PROVENANCE advisory naming the `replacement`. Optional `rationale` is surfaced in the finding detail. The intended workflow is: an ADR retires a slug, adds an entry here, and the walker keeps subsequent PRs honest by flagging any drift back to the old name. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="substrate-manifest.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://whalermike.github.io/uiao/schemas/substrate-manifest/substrate-manifest.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO Substrate Manifest Schema",
  "description": "Schema for the top-level substrate manifest that declares the modules, roles, and drift-scan scope of the UIAO monorepo.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "metadata",
    "workspace",
    "github",
    "modules",
    "drift_scan",
    "registry_refs"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "metadata": {
      "description": "Canonical frontmatter per src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json.",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "workspace": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "root_env"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "root_env": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Name of the environment variable that holds the absolute workspace root path. Never hardcode the path value itself.",
          "const": "UIAO_WORKSPACE_ROOT"
        },
        "fallbacks": {
          "type": "object",
          "additionalProperties": false,
          "description": "Documented platform-specific fallback examples. Informational only; runtime MUST read the env var.",
          "properties": {
            "linux": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "macos": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "windows": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "github": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "root"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "root": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "uri",
          "description": "Canonical GitHub URL for the monorepo."
        },
        "default_branch": {
          "type": "string",
          "default": "main"
        }
      }
    },
    "modules": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/module"
      }
    },
    "sub_boundaries": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Optional sub-boundaries inside a top-level module.",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
          "type": "object",
          "required": [
            "name",
            "path",
            "role"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false,
          "properties": {
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "path": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "role": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "drift_scan": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "classes",
        "roots"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "classes": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "uniqueItems": true,
          "items": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "DRIFT-SCHEMA",
              "DRIFT-SEMANTIC",
              "DRIFT-PROVENANCE",
              "DRIFT-AUTHZ",
              "DRIFT-IDENTITY"
            ]
          },
          "description": "Drift classes the manifest declares itself subject to. Full taxonomy defined in docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd."
        },
        "roots": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "uniqueItems": true,
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": "Module paths that the drift detector walks when validating the substrate."
        },
        "severity_model": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "P1",
            "P2",
            "P3",
            "P4"
          ],
          "description": "Optional upper bound on severity."
        }
      }
    },
    "registry_refs": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "document_registry"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "document_registry": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "adapter_registry": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "modernization_registry": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "metadata_schema": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "adapter_registry_schema": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "orgtree_readiness_schema": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Path to OrgTree readiness bundle schema (UIAO_006/007 OrgTree modernization). Added in v0.6.0."
        }
      }
    },
    "retired_slugs": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "Slugs that have been renamed by an ADR. The substrate walker scans canon/ and docs/ for any literal occurrence of `slug` and emits a P2 DRIFT-PROVENANCE advisory naming the `replacement`. Optional `rationale` is surfaced in the finding detail. The intended workflow is: an ADR retires a slug, adds an entry here, and the walker keeps subsequent PRs honest by flagging any drift back to the old name.",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "slug",
          "replacement"
        ],
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "properties": {
          "slug": {
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The retired slug (e.g., `MOD_A`). Matched as a literal with word boundaries."
          },
          "replacement": {
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The current canonical slug that replaces it (e.g., `UIAO_151`)."
          },
          "rationale": {
            "type": "string",
            "description": "Short citation of the ADR or PR that retired the slug (e.g., `ADR-060`)."
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "$defs": {
    "module": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "name",
        "path",
        "role",
        "canon_consumer"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Module identifier (matches the top-level directory name)."
        },
        "path": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Repo-relative path to the module root."
        },
        "role": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "authority",
            "consumer",
            "package",
            "tooling",
            "staging",
            "deploy"
          ],
          "description": "Module role. Post-ADR-032 the canonical set is: authority (defines canon), consumer (derives from canon), package (single installable distribution carrying both canon and code), tooling (workspace scripts), staging (draft surface \u2014 not canon), deploy (deployment artifacts)."
        },
        "canon_consumer": {
          "type": "boolean",
          "description": "True if the module derives artifacts from canon (see src/uiao/rules/canon-consumer.md)."
        },
        "summary": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "registry_refs": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
